vehicle.label: 6-DOF Industrial Arm
vehicle.desc: 6-DOF serial industrial robot arm, 5kg payload, 600mm reach

parts.label: Base Joint (J1)
parts.spec: Base rotary joint J1, +-180deg, harmonic drive, 100Nm peak torque, mounting flange ISO 9409

parts.label: Shoulder Joint (J2)
parts.spec: Shoulder pitch joint J2, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 80Nm, cable routing through center bore

parts.label: Upper Arm (Link 2-3)
parts.spec: Upper arm link, 300mm length, hollow tube with cable conduit, lightweight Al 7075

parts.label: Elbow Joint (J3)
parts.spec: Elbow pitch joint J3, +-150deg, cycloidal reducer, 50Nm, encoder dual-stack

parts.label: Forearm + Wrist (J4)
parts.spec: Forearm with wrist roll J4, 250mm length, +-360deg continuous, slip ring for power/signal

parts.label: Wrist Pitch (J5)
parts.spec: Wrist pitch joint J5, +-120deg, harmonic drive, 20Nm, compact form factor

parts.label: Wrist Roll (J6)
parts.spec: Wrist final roll joint J6, +-360deg, harmonic drive, 10Nm, ISO 9409-1 50mm tool flange

parts.label: Tool Flange + Changer
parts.spec: Tool changer master plate at J6 end, pneumatic locking, 4 utility ports

parts.label: Cable Management Spine
parts.spec: External cable carrier from base to wrist, drag chain or spiral, signal + power + pneumatic

parts.label: Replaceable Motor Module Set
parts.spec: Actuation_motors closure module: replaceable motor_module cartridges for J1-J6, fastener_access, coupling_dummy, insert/washer preload pads, torque_Nm intent labels

parts.label: Encoder Cover + Sensing Set
parts.spec: Sensing_encoders closure module: encoder_pocket and encoder_cover at each joint, index marks, cable exit strain relief, inspection labels

parts.label: Drive Electronics Bay
parts.spec: Drive_electronics bay with driver_bay, power_channel, signal_channel, ground_point, service cover, connector keying, thermal inspection window

requirements: Tool flange with standard bolt pattern and locating boss
4 utility ports for pneumatic locking
Food-grade hygienic design
IP67 sealed joints
NSF-compliant materials
Payload capacity: 5kg
Reach: 600mm
6-DOF serial industrial robot arm

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to heat sink design.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal analysis and optimize heat sink geometry.

risk.desc: Risk of cable harness interference with moving parts.
risk.mit: Ensure sufficient clearance and strain relief for cables.

risk.desc: Risk of harmonic drive failure due to excessive torque.
risk.mit: Implement torque limiting mechanism and monitor operation.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure due to insufficient wall thickness.
risk.mit: Review and adjust wall thickness to meet structural requirements.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to unclear assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Clarify and document assembly sequence in cad_brief.

Allows maintenance and inspection of the base joint

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to heat dissipation from motor.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management strategies such as heat sinks or cooling channels.

risk.desc: Risk of cable routing interference during joint travel.
risk.mit: Ensure sufficient slack in harness routing and use strain relief at critical points.

risk.desc: Risk of reduced cycle life due to inadequate preload.
risk.mit: Ensure proper preload on critical joints and conduct cycle life testing.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment due to tolerance stack-up.

risk.desc: Risk of environmental contamination due to inadequate sealing.
risk.mit: Use NSF-compliant sealing materials and conduct environmental testing.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion mismatch between aluminum and steel fasteners.
risk.mit: Use thermal expansion compatible materials or design for thermal expansion.

risk.desc: Cable conduit may not be adequately protected from pinch points during full motion range.
risk.mit: Ensure harness crossing joints has slack loop and strain relief at both ends.

risk.desc: Insufficient engagement length for threaded connections into printed or soft material.
risk.mit: Use inserts or bosses with adequate engagement depth.

risk.desc: Potential for misalignment during assembly due to lack of clear datum references.
risk.mit: Ensure primary datum feature is explicitly named and placed.

risk.desc: Insufficient inspection access windows for service and maintenance.
risk.mit: Add callouts, access windows, labels, datum pads, and verification focus.

risk.desc: The thermal management plan for the cycloidal reducer may not be sufficient for sustained operation at maximum torque.
risk.mit: Implement additional cooling measures or redesign the heat sink.

risk.desc: The IP67 sealing design might fail under extreme environmental conditions, leading to water ingress.
risk.mit: Review and reinforce sealing points, especially around fasteners and cable entry points.

risk.desc: The use of LPBF for the reducer dummy may introduce porosity issues affecting mechanical integrity.
risk.mit: Conduct post-processing treatments to reduce porosity and enhance mechanical properties.

risk.desc: The design does not account for thermal expansion, which could lead to misalignment over time.
risk.mit: Include thermal expansion joints or compensators in the design.

risk.desc: The encoder cover may not provide sufficient protection in harsh environments.
risk.mit: Use a more robust material for the encoder cover or add an additional protective layer.
